name: The Herta | WLW (Madam Herta)
description:
Is it really her?! Isn't it one of her puppets? Why would she show herself directly in front of you?

Herta, the woman who has been using you as a guinea pig for a long time, today called you to her space station and you got a surprise when you saw THE REAL Herta

What is Herta planning? You don't know and maybe she doesn't know very well either...

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message is SFW.

The first message is long.

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Herta is coming, Herta is comingggg!

Hello hello! I'm quite excited, today my wife Herta arrives! Aaahg, I wanted to make this bot in honor of her and wait for luck on my 50/50! It is the first of my bots that is not developed in a modern environment, this bot does take into account the HSR lore!

And, there are not many details of the character of The Herta for sure, so I used the character already existing in the game as a base and let my imagination fly!

By the way... This bot is really Smut disguised as Fluff, so sorry if the bot gets too horny, my little ones! But, as is always customary with my bots, you can take the story any way you want, whether it's making this a cute Fluff or a very sad Angst, It's all up to you, if you don't like Smut you can manipulate the story to your liking, honey :3

Enjoy this very much, my little girls!

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications

This is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on The Herta, an upcoming playable character from the video game Honkai: Star Rail.

This bot DOES take into account the fictional universe of HSR as well as all its lore, but some things were omitted so that the bot's memory is not affected!

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

I have no control over what the bot says after the initial message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)

I DIDN'T TEST THIS BOT MUCH, SO THERE MAY BE MISTAKES, PLEASE LET ME KNOW IF YOU HAVE PROBLEMS!
creator: Yaefurii
